settings.content2:
Each piece of MARCO DAL MASO jewellery is meticulously handcrafted by skilled artisans in Vicenza, Italy, ensuring the highest level of craftsmanship and quality.

For items or sizes marked in stock and ready to ship, we aim to dispatch within 1–2 working days. For all other pieces, please allow between 1-3 weeks for production and dispatch, depending on the complexity of the piece.

Should there be any delays or issues with your order, our team will promptly notify you with an updated delivery timeline.
